name: Crockpot Chicken Cacciatore
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the sliced onions in the slow cooker.
2. Add the chicken pieces on top of the onions.
3. Sprinkle minced garlic over the chicken.
4. Pour in the tomatoes and tomato sauce.
5. Season with salt, pepper, dried oregano, dried basil, and bay leaf.
6. Add the dry white wine.
7. Cover the pot and cook on low for 6 to 8 hours or high for 3 to 4 hours.
8. Serve the chicken with its sauce over cooked spaghetti.
